title: Collection list not displaying data
symptom: The collection list shows 'Empty List' despite data being fetched correctly from Xano.
applies_when: Using a collection list in weweb
Data structure from Xano has changed
not_this_if: Data is not fetched correctly from Xano
root_cause: The data structure returned from Xano may have changed due to enabling pagination or sorting, leading to the collection list not being able to access the correct data path.
fix_steps: Access the nocode Bind editor view in weweb
Navigate down the collection tree to select the nested [items] array
Ensure the binding formula points to [news-items].data.items
Save the changes and refresh the collection list
agent_instruction: Update the binding formula to point to [news-items].data.items in the nocode Bind editor.
